response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: Analyzed the audio track of the VTuber video, which features comedy dialogue rather than vocal music (as confirmed by the reference). 2. JSON Usage: The reference contains no lyrics, meaning 100% manual transcription and translation of the characters' spoken dialogue was completed. 3. Timing & Pacing: Timed subtitle blocks precisely to the sudden and rapid comedic vocalizations of the VTubers, avoiding overlapping lines and handling multiple speakers.
